faqs.question: Do you provide Square hardware (iPad, printers)?
faqs.answer: We don't sell hardware directly. We provide a recommended hardware list and can guide you through purchasing from Square or authorised Australian retailers. If you need on-site installation, that's available as an add-on.

faqs.question: Can you migrate our menu from another POS to Square?
faqs.answer: Yes. We'll map your existing menu items, modifiers, and pricing into Square during the discovery phase. Most migrations from Lightspeed, Clover, or paper menus take 1–2 days.

faqs.question: How does QR table ordering work with Square?
faqs.answer: Each table gets a unique QR code. Customers scan it on their phone, browse the menu, and place orders directly. Orders appear on your Square POS and kitchen printer instantly — no app download required.

faqs.question: Can this help us reduce UberEats and DoorDash fees?
faqs.answer: Square Online Ordering lets you take pickup and delivery orders directly through your own website — no 30% marketplace commission. We can set it up alongside your existing marketplace listings so you gradually shift customers to direct ordering.

faqs.question: What do we need to prepare before you start?
faqs.answer: Your full menu with prices, trading hours, logo, contact details, and bank account for Square payouts. We provide a detailed checklist after the discovery call.

faqs.question: Do you do on-site visits in Newcastle?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're based in Newcastle and can do on-site hardware setup and staff training. Most of the configuration work is done remotely, with on-site visits for go-live and training.

faqs.question: How long does the full setup take?
faqs.answer: Typically 7–10 business days from discovery call to go-live. Complex menus with many modifiers may take slightly longer.

faqs.question: Is this a one-off fee or ongoing?
faqs.answer: The setup is a one-off fixed fee ($3,500–$5,000). We also offer an optional monthly support plan ($199–$399/month) for ongoing menu updates, monitoring, and priority support.

faqs.question: What if we already have a Square account?
faqs.answer: No problem. We'll audit your existing setup, clean up the menu structure, and configure the features you're not yet using — like online ordering or QR table ordering.

faqs.question: Do you handle our website or just Square?
faqs.answer: This package focuses on Square (POS, online ordering, QR). If you need a website built or redesigned, we offer that as a separate service. We can connect Square Online to your existing domain.

faqs.question: What results can we expect?
faqs.answer: A fully configured Square POS, live online ordering page, and QR table ordering — all tested and ready for service. Many restaurants see a reduction in order errors and faster table turnover within the first month. We don't guarantee specific revenue increases.

faqs.question: Can we add more locations later?
faqs.answer: Yes. Square supports multi-location setups. Each additional venue follows the same standardised process and is quoted separately.
